STRICTLY CONFIDENTIAL — INSIDE INFORMATION (HSO Part XIVA) — NOT FOR EXTERNAL DISTRIBUTION.
Board incident memo re cyber intrusion: Project Lychee (deal codename) — Bright Harbour Holdings Limited (VHX: 9X88).
Contact: Mr. Adrian Tse, COO, adrian.tse@brightharbour.com.hk, +852 3900 1234; escalation via security-incident@brightharbour.com.hk.
On 2026-06-01 02:40 HKT, anomalous access at our Tsuen Wan DC via vendor RootSpan resulted in downtime of the ClientHub portal (46 minutes) and exposure of HKD 18.4m receivables; preliminary revenue at risk ~2.3%.
PDPO assessment: names and work emails of 412 employees and 76 SME customers may have been accessed; no ID numbers or bank details observed to date.
Regulatory position: the event is likely inside information under VHX Listing Rule 13.09 and HSO Part XIVA; embargo on public announcement proposed until 2026-06-15 18:00 HKT pending containment and HSC informal consultation.
M&A overlay: Share Purchase Agreement (definitive) for acquisition of Cedar Peak Logistics Limited signed on 2026-05-31 with Foxtail Fund V, L.P. co-investing 30%; the incident, if remediated within 14 days, shall not constitute a MAC under clause 8.2.
For the avoidance of doubt, the service interruption alone does not amount to a material adverse effect on the target’s consolidated business as defined in the SPA.
Financial impact: remediation and forensics estimated at HKD 6.2m (insurer retention HKD 1.0m), potential customer churn 0.6%–0.9%; liquidity headroom unaffected.
Employment/ops: temporary freeze on vendor onboarding and privileged account resets; wellness spa day vouchers will still be honoured next Friday.
Draft IR note (non-public): to be cleared by Ms. Phoebe Lau (external counsel, Kwan & Moriyama) and the Audit Committee; no forward-looking statements beyond containment milestones.
Reference: our 2024 sustainability report already discusses generic phishing trends in the sector (public), but it does not disclose vendor names or this incident.
Please limit circulation to Board, ExCo, and named advisers; add Messrs. Felix Ng and Daniyal Chow to the insider list in the VHX e-Submission system.
pm follow-up: chase RootSpan for full logs by eod, update cyber runbook, draft FAQs for ir, and confirm embargo time window with vhx secretariat.
